maker_checker: reviews by independent agents (code-reviewer, spec-compliance-auditor); maker did not review own code. First code-review attempt was interrupted by a platform session limit and re-run to completion.

findings.summary: spec prose names lists as an atomic block but no test locked list-integrity
setext (underline) headings leaked '======' into the heading trail and chunk text, corrupting citation context (NFR-001)
findings.resolution: fixed: heading title taken from markdown-it inline token, normalized to ATX; +regression test

findings.summary: closed-ATX '## Title ##' left trailing hashes in the title
findings.resolution: fixed by the same inline-content normalization; +regression test

verified_not_bugs: content before first heading preserved (empty trail, source_path still cites)
idempotency: deterministic uuid5 ids + delete-then-upsert (wait=True) correct for reingest and shrunk-file cases
